concerns.reason: The evidence for hypoxemia actually states SpO2 was maintained in the high 90s on 50% O2, which is not hypoxemia.

recommended_revisions.suggested: SpO2 maintained in high 90s on 50% O2 [E:note:row422448:17] and left arm swelling [E:note:row422448:26].
recommended_revisions.reason: Corrects the misinterpretation of the oxygen saturation data.
